zh.lifeSummary: King Ardgal MacMahon於大約1365年出生在愛爾蘭武爾斯特。他於大約1384年與Queen Margaret de la Herne結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1427年在愛爾蘭庫迪 泰龍享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: King Ardgal MacMahon于大约1365年出生在爱尔兰武爾斯特。他于大约1384年与Queen Margaret de la Herne结婚。他们至少是12个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1427年在爱尔兰庫迪 泰龍享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacMahon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McMahon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Kieran, Maeve, Seamus, Brigid, Connor, Dermot, Eamon, Fergus, Grainne, James Patrick.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Mathghamhna, a patronymic from the byname Mathghamhain literally meaning ‘good calf’, a kenning for ‘bear’. This was the name of two (unrelated) chieftain families in counties Clare (Thomond) and Monaghan (the kingdom of Oriel). See also Mahon 1, and Mahoney . In northern Ireland it is sometimes Anglicized as Matthews , since Matha was the Irish form of the Biblical name (see McMath ). In Scotland Matheson was used to translate both of these surnames.

nameMeanings.name: Ardgal
meanings: Irish: From ard exalted, gal valour.

en.lifeSummary: King Ardgal MacMahon was born about 1365, in Ulster, Ireland. He married Queen Margaret de la Herne about 1384. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1427, in County Tyrone, Ireland, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: King Ardgal MacMahon est né environ 1365, à Ulster, Irlande. Il a épousé Queen Margaret de la Herne environ 1384. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1427, à County Tyrone, Irlande, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: King Ardgal MacMahon wurde um 1365 in Ulster, Irland geboren. Er hat um 1384 Queen Margaret de la Herne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1427 im Alter von 63 Jahren in County Tyrone, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: King Ardgal MacMahon è nato il circa 1365 nel Ulster, Irlanda. Lui sposato Queen Margaret de la Herne circa 1384. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1427, nel County Tyrone, Irlanda, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: King Ardgal MacMahonは約1365年にアイルランドウルスターで生まれた。約1384年にQueen Margaret de la Herneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1427年にアイルランドコウントイ トイロンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: King Ardgal MacMahon(은)는 대략 1365년 아일랜드 울스터에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1384년 Queen Margaret de la Herne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1427년 아일랜드 카운티 타이론에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: King Ardgal MacMahon nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Ulster, Irlanda. Ele casou-se com Queen Margaret de la Herne aproximadamente 1384. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1427, em County Tyrone, Irlanda, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: King Ardgal MacMahon родился около 1365 г. в местности улстир, Ирландия. Он женился на женщине по имени Queen Margaret de la Herne около 1384 г. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1427 г. в местности коунти тироун, Ирландия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: King Ardgal MacMahon nació aproximadamente 1365, en Ulster, Irlanda. Se casó con Queen Margaret de la Herne aproximadamente 1384. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1427, en County Tyrone, Irlanda, a la edad de 63 años.
